name: Classic Oxford Formal Shirt
description: Crisp cotton Oxford shirt with button-down collar. Perfect for office and semi-formal occasions. Easy-care fabric.

name: Linen Blend Casual Shirt
description: Breathable linen-blend shirt for summer. Relaxed fit with chest pocket. Ideal for casual outings.

name: Slim Fit Solid Dress Shirt
description: Slim fit dress shirt in premium cotton. Spread collar and single cuff. Versatile for work and events.

name: Checked Casual Shirt
description: Lightweight checked shirt with regular fit. Great for weekend wear and layering.

name: Denim Long Sleeve Shirt
description: Classic denim shirt in mid-weight cotton. Button closure and chest pockets. Durable and stylish.

name: Essential Cotton Crew Neck T-Shirt
description: Soft 100% cotton crew neck tee. Regular fit. Everyday essential in solid colours.

name: Premium V-Neck T-Shirt Pack
description: Pack of 2 premium combed cotton V-neck tees. Smooth finish, minimal shrinkage.

name: Graphic Print Oversized T-Shirt
description: Oversized fit tee with subtle graphic print. 220 GSM cotton. Street-style ready.

name: Polo Neck T-Shirt
description: Classic polo with ribbed collar. Piqué cotton blend. Smart casual staple.

name: Striped Henley T-Shirt
description: Henley neck with button placket. Soft cotton with subtle stripes. Relaxed fit.

name: Slim Fit Stretch Jeans
description: Slim fit jeans with 2% elastane for comfort. Mid-rise, five-pocket style. Durable denim.

name: Regular Fit Classic Jeans
description: Timeless regular fit jeans. 100% cotton denim. Straight leg, versatile for daily wear.

name: Slim Tapered Stretch Jeans
description: Slim tapered leg with stretch. Modern fit from hip to ankle. Easy movement.

name: Relaxed Fit Carpenter Jeans
description: Relaxed fit with utility pockets. Heavy-duty denim. Workwear inspired.

name: Skinny Fit Ripped Jeans
description: Skinny fit with distressed details. Stretch denim for comfort. Casual street style.

name: Flat Front Chino Trousers
description: Flat front chinos in cotton twill. Smart casual. Belt loops and side pockets.

name: Formal Office Trousers
description: Crease-resistant formal trousers. Mid-rise, straight leg. Ideal for office wear.

name: Slim Fit Jogger Trousers
description: Slim fit joggers with elasticated waist and cuffs. Soft cotton blend. Casual comfort.

name: Pleated Wide Leg Trousers
description: Wide leg trousers with front pleats. Premium fabric. Contemporary formal look.

name: Cargo Trousers
description: Utility cargo trousers with multiple pockets. Durable cotton. Functional and stylish.
